name: Dialog
description: Modal dialog with title, icon, body content, actions, scrim close, ESC close, and divider. Use with IDialogService or standalone via @bind-Visible.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Main body content rendered inside the dialog.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Title text displayed in the dialog header.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional hero icon shown centered above the title.

parameters.name: Actions
parameters.description: Action buttons rendered in the dialog footer.

parameters.name: Visible
parameters.description: Controls whether the dialog is shown. Supports @bind-Visible.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Maximum width of the dialog (Sm, Md, Lg, or CSS value).

parameters.name: CloseOnScrimClick
parameters.description: Closes the dialog when the scrim backdrop is clicked.

parameters.name: CloseOnEsc
parameters.description: Closes the dialog when the Escape key is pressed.

parameters.name: Divider
parameters.description: Shows a divider between the header and the content.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name when Title is empty (aria-label).

examples: var ok = await Dialog.ConfirmAsync("Delete", "Cannot be undone.", "Delete", "Cancel");
